name: Http
description: Http schema from Censys Platform API

body.description: The body of the HTTP response. For hosts without a name, the first 64KB are available. For hosts with a name, only 6KB are available.

body_size.description: The length, in bytes, of services.http.response.body; at most, 64KB.

headers.description: The key-value header pairs included in the response.

html_tags.description: A list of the <title> and <meta> tags from services.http.response.body.

html_title.description: The title of the HTML page: the inner contents of the <title> tag in the response body, if present.

network_log.description: List of all resources fetched when visiting this page as browser

protocol.description: The protocol field of the response, which includes the claimed HTTP version number.

redirect_chain.description: If the scan redirects, the list of followup scans performed

status_code.description: A 3-digit integer result code indicating the result of the services.http.request.

status_reason.description: A human-readable phrase describing the status code.

uri.description: The full path used to make the request, which includes the scheme, host, port (when non-standard), and endpoint.
